advice: Apply Mancozeb 75 WP (2 g/L) or Copper Oxychloride 50 WP (3 g/L) at pink bud stage. Prune and destroy fallen leaves. Introduce disease-resistant varieties like Redfree or Liberty next season.
image_analysis: Dark, olive-colored lesions/spots visible on the leaf surface corresponding to Apple Scab infestation.
